title: cyperus ovularis var. cylindricus
intro: Cyperus ovularis var. cylindricus, also known as the cylindrical papyrus sedge, is a variety of the Cyperus ovularis plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cyperus ovularis var. cylindricus include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or compress to accelerate healing and reduce pain.
